CustomField.description: The sum of the Value of all relatd Asset records for this Service File where Have Access Now is checked. Tip: To make changes, create or update a related Asset record.
CustomField.inlineHelpText:
The sum of the Value of all relatd Asset records for this Service File where Have Access Now is checked.
Tip: To make changes, create or update a related Asset record.
CustomField.label: Total Available Assets
